---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something herminal should do
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do? What's blocking you today? Skip the
proposed solution at first — describe the situation.

## What you'd like to see

The shape of the feature, at a paragraph level. UI sketches /
keyboard shortcuts / config syntax — whatever applies.

## Alternatives considered

If you've tried other terminals or workflows that solve a similar
problem, mention them. We can probably learn from what they got
right (or wrong).

## Is this in PRD scope?

Check [`docs/define/herminal.prd.md`](docs/define/herminal.prd.md)
and [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](CONTRIBUTING.md) "Out of scope" before filing.
Cross-platform, cloud sync, AI chat — these are explicit non-goals.

If you're not sure, file anyway and we'll triage.
